Home / Services / Custom Cabinets

Custom Cabinets

Elevate your home with handcrafted custom cabinets designed to your exact specifications.

Tired of cookie-cutter cabinets that don't fit your space or style? Valles Carpentry specializes in creating custom cabinets that are both beautiful and functional. We work with you to design cabinets that perfectly complement your home's aesthetic and meet your unique storage needs. From kitchen remodels in Nichols Hills to bathroom upgrades in Mesta Park, we've transformed countless spaces with our custom cabinetry. We handle everything from material selection (considering Oklahoma's humidity) to expert installation, ensuring a seamless and stress-free experience. Our cabinets are built to last, using durable materials and time-tested construction techniques. We understand the need to maximize space, especially in Oklahoma City's older homes. Let us design and build the perfect custom cabinets for your home.

Our Process

  1. 01 Step 1: Initial Consultation: Discuss your needs, style preferences, and budget.
  2. 02 Step 2: Design & Planning: We create detailed designs and provide material samples.
  3. 03 Step 3: Fabrication: Our skilled craftsmen build your cabinets with precision.
  4. 04 Step 4: Installation: We install your cabinets with care and attention to detail.

Benefits

  • Maximize storage space
  • Enhance your home's value
  • Create a unique and personalized look
  • Enjoy durable and long-lasting cabinets

Frequently Asked Questions

What types of wood do you use for custom cabinets?

We offer a wide variety of wood options, including oak, maple, cherry, and walnut. We can also work with other materials upon request.

How long does it take to get custom cabinets installed?

The timeline depends on the complexity of the project, but typically it takes 4-6 weeks from design to installation.

Do you offer cabinet refacing services?

Yes, we offer cabinet refacing as a more budget-friendly alternative to full cabinet replacement.

Get a Free Estimate

Ready to get started with custom cabinets? Contact us today.

Request Quote Or call: +14059228502
